$comment: Developer/boot file (mod-owned; overwritten on update). User-facing knobs live in Mod Settings (F10 -> OSF UI) and persist under Documents\My Games\Starfield\OSFUI.
$comment_devMode: devMode (verbose logging + PNG dump + reload key) is intentionally omitted: it defaults on in a debug build and off in a release build. Add "devMode": true here to force it on (e.g. for a bug report).
